function initials(name) {
  return name
    .split(" ")
    .slice(0, 2)
    .map((w) => w[0])
    .join("")
    .toUpperCase();
}

      job.location.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
      job.desc.toLowerCase().includes(query);

    const matchExp = !filterExp || job.exp === filterExp;

    setApplyingJob(job);

  function submitApplication() {
    if (!applyForm.name.trim() || !applyForm.phone.trim()) {

      return;
    }

      id: Date.now(),
      jobId: applyingJob.id,

      name: applyForm.name.trim(),
      phone: applyForm.phone.trim(),
      message: applyForm.message.trim(),
      status: "pending",

      appliedAt: new Date().toLocaleDateString(language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-IN", { day: "numeric", month: "short" }),

    setApplications([newApp, ...applications]);
    setApplyingJob(null);
    showToast(t.appSubmitted);
  }

  function toggleHired(appId) {

  function rateApplication(appId, value) {

  async function runAIMatch() {
    if (!aiSkills.trim()) { showToast(t.fillAll); return; }
    setAiLoading(true);
    setAiResult("");
    try {
      const jobList = allJobs.map((j) => `${j.id}. ${j.title} at ${j.company}, ${j.location} — ${j.salary}`).join("\n");
      const res = await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
          max_tokens: 800,
          system: `You are a helpful career advisor for rural India, especially Neemuch-Mandsaur area of MP. Respond in ${language === "hi" ? "Hindi" : "English"}. Given a candidate's skills and job listings, recommend top 3 matches with simple, encouraging reasons. Format: '1. Job at Company — reason'. Add one short tip. Keep language very simple for village/small town people.`,
          messages: [{ role: "user", content: `My skills: ${aiSkills}\n\nAvailable jobs:\n${jobList}\n\nTop 3 matches?` }],
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      const text = data.content?.map((c) => c.text || "").join("") || (language === "hi" ? "कनेक्ट नहीं कर सका।" : "Could not get recommendations.");
      setAiResult(text);
    } catch {
      setAiResult(language === "hi" ? "कनेक्ट नहीं कर सका। कृपया फिर कोशिश करें।" : "Could not connect. Please try again.");
    }
    setAiLoading(false);
  }

  function reportJob(jobId) {
    if (reportedJobs.includes(jobId)) {
      showToast(t.reportSuccess);
      return;
    }
    setReportedJobs([...reportedJobs, jobId]);
    showToast(t.reportSuccess);
  }

  function readJobAloud(job) {
    if (!window.speechSynthesis) {
      showToast(t.readUnavailable);
      return;
    }
    const voiceText = `${job.title}. ${job.company}. ${job.location}. ${job.desc}`;
    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(voiceText);
    utterance.lang = language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-US";
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
  }

  function startVoiceSearch() {
    const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    if (!SpeechRecognition) {
      showToast(t.voiceUnavailable);
      return;
    }
    setVoiceLoading(true);
    try {
      const recognition = new SpeechRecognition();
      recognition.lang = language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-US";
      recognition.interimResults = false;
      recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;
      recognition.onresult = (event) => {
        const transcript = event.results[0][0].transcript;
        setSearch(transcript);
        setVoiceLoading(false);
        showToast(language === "hi" ? `आपने कहा: ${transcript}` : `Heard: ${transcript}`);
      };
      recognition.onerror = () => {
        setVoiceLoading(false);
        showToast(language === "hi" ? "वॉइस सर्च रुक गई" : "Voice search stopped");
      };
      recognition.onend = () => setVoiceLoading(false);
      recognition.start();
    } catch {
      setVoiceLoading(false);
      showToast(language === "hi" ? "वॉइस सर्च शुरू नहीं हो सकी" : "Could not start voice search");
    }
  }

    if (!window.confirm(t.confirmRemove)) return;
    setEmployees(employees.filter((e) => e.id !== id));

  }

  function cycleAttendance(empId, key) {
    setEmployees((prev) =>
      prev.map((e) => {
        if (e.id !== empId) return e;
        const current = e.attendance[key];
        const next = { ...e.attendance };
        if (!current) next[key] = "present";
        else if (current === "present") next[key] = "leave";
        else delete next[key];
        return { ...e, attendance: next };
      })
    );
    setSelectedEmployee((prev) => {
      if (!prev || prev.id !== empId) return prev;
      const current = prev.attendance[key];
      const next = { ...prev.attendance };
      if (!current) next[key] = "present";
      else if (current === "present") next[key] = "leave";
      else delete next[key];
      return { ...prev, attendance: next };
    });
  }

  function monthStats(emp, year, month) {
    const prefix = `${year}-${month}-`;
    let present = 0;
    let leave = 0;
    Object.keys(emp.attendance).forEach((k) => {
      if (k.startsWith(prefix)) {
        if (emp.attendance[k] === "present") present++;
        else if (emp.attendance[k] === "leave") leave++;
      }
    });
    const salary = emp.wageType === "daily" ? present * emp.wageAmount : Math.max(0, Math.round(emp.wageAmount - leave * (emp.wageAmount / 30)));
    return { present, leave, salary };
  }

            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 16 }}>{t.yourPostedJobs}</h2>
            {postedJobs.length === 0 ? (
              <p style={{ color: "#999", fontSize: 14 }}>{t.noPostedJobsYet}</p>
            ) : postedJobs.map((job, idx) => {
              const apps = applications.filter((a) => a.jobId === job.id);
              const expanded = expandedJobId === job.id;
              return (
                <div key={job.id} style={s.postedJobCard}>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                    <div>
                      <div style={s.jobTitle}>{job.title}</div>
                      <div style={s.jobSub}>{job.company} · {job.location}</div>
                    </div>
                    <button style={s.chip(expanded)} onClick={() => setExpandedJobId(expanded ? null : job.id)}>{apps.length} {t.applicantsLabel} {expanded ? "▲" : "▼"}</button>
                  </div>
                  {expanded && (
                    <div style={{ marginTop: 14, borderTop: "1px solid #f1f1f1", paddingTop: 14 }}>
                      {apps.length === 0 ? (
                        <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#999" }}>{t.noApplicants}</p>
                      ) : apps.map((app) => (
                        <div key={app.id} style={s.applicantCard}>
                          <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                            <strong style={{ fontSize: 15 }}>{app.name}</strong>
                            <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#666" }}>{t.appliedOn} {app.appliedAt}</span>
                          </div>
                          {app.message && <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#444", margin: "8px 0" }}>{app.message}</p>}
                          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap", alignItems: "center" }}>
                            <a href={`tel:${app.phone}`} style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#185FA5", textDecoration: "none", fontWeight: 700 }}>📞 {app.phone}</a>
                            <button style={s.hireBtn(app.status === "hired")} onClick={() => toggleHired(app.id)}>{app.status === "hired" ? t.hired : t.markHired}</button>
                            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}>
                              {Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, index) => (
                                <div key={index} style={s.ratingDot(app.rating > index)} onClick={() => rateApplication(app.id, index + 1)}></div>
                              ))}
                              <span style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#555" }}>{app.rating ? `${app.rating}/5` : (language === "hi" ? "रेट करें" : "Rate")}</span>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {applyingJob && (
        <div style={s.modalOverlay} onClick={() => setApplyingJob(null)}>
          <div style={s.modalBox} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 8 }}>{t.applyFormTitle}</h3>
            <p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#555", marginBottom: 16 }}>{applyingJob.title} · {applyingJob.company}</p>
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourName}</label>
            <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Suresh Patel" value={applyForm.name} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, name: e.target.value })} />
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourPhone}</label>
            <input style={s.formInput} type="tel" placeholder="e.g. 98765 43210" value={applyForm.phone} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, phone: e.target.value })} />
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourMessage}</label>
            <textarea style={{ ...s.formInput, minHeight: 90, resize: "vertical" }} value={applyForm.message} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, message: e.target.value })} />
            <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
              <button style={{ ...s.actionBtn, ...s.secondaryBtn, flex: 1, borderRadius: 14 }} onClick={() => setApplyingJob(null)}>{t.cancel}</button>
              <button style={{ ...s.submitBtn, flex: 1, borderRadius: 14, marginTop: 0 }} onClick={submitApplication}>{t.submitApplication}</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div style={s.toast}>{toast}</div>
    </div>
  );
}
